description_long: This bungalow complex features several single-story residential units with a mix of red-tiled and dark flat roofs, arranged around a central courtyard and green spaces. The property includes paved walkways, a swimming pool, and multiple driveways with parked cars, suggesting a suburban or gated community layout. The buildings are surrounded by manicured lawns, palm trees, and other landscaping elements, providing a pleasant and organized environment. The bungalows themselves have large windows, some with attached garages, and are constructed with a combination of white and gray exterior finishes. Water tanks and utility structures are visible at the rear, indicating modern amenities and infrastructure. The overall design is open and accessible, with clear separation between private and communal areas.
description: A group of modern single-story bungalows with red-tiled and flat roofs, arranged around landscaped courtyards, driveways, and a swimming pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveways, red-roofed bungalows, and the swimming pool in the foreground.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the central courtyard, playground, and the arrangement of bungalows with visible green spaces.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the utility area with water tanks, additional green space, and the back sides of the bungalows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the rear facades of the red-roofed bungalows, garages, and the pool area to the right.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front-facing windows
